properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Tens of thousands years from now You will always be the same The infinite God yes you are Ruler of everything

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I lift my spirit to glorify your everlasting holiness On my knees I bow down, you are forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are forever, all praises belongs to you, forever You are forever, adoration belongs to you, forever All the glory and honor, the heart of worship, you are forever.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The sunsets and the moon fades Yet you'll always remain Shining all through night and day Wisdom of everything

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I lift my heart to glorify your everlasting holiness On my knees I bow down, you are forever.
